description: Plan an IFR cross-country flight from San Jose (SJC airport) to Sacramento Executive (SAC airport), routing via the San Jose VOR, Modesto VOR (MOD), and Sacramento VOR (SAC). When searching these identifiers in Avare, both VOR navaids and airports appear as results — you must select the correct type for each waypoint. Build the five-waypoint flight plan: SJC (airport) -> SJC (VOR) -> MOD (VOR) -> SAC (VOR) -> SAC (airport). Switch the map to the IFR Low Enroute chart. Save the plan as "IFR_VALLEY". Finally, look up SAC airport in the Chart Supplement to verify the destination.
